basic_details.job_title: UP Anganwadi Recruitment 2026 Notification Out - Apply Online for 180 Anganwadi Worker Posts in Meerut District
basic_details.short_information: The District Programme Officer (ICDS), Meerut has released the Meerut Anganwadi Recruitment 2026 notification for 180 Anganwadi Worker (Karyakatri) vacancies across 13 Child Development Projects in urban and rural areas of Meerut district. Only female candidates aged 18 to 35 years as on 01 January 2026 who are permanent residents of the concerned gram sabha/ward are eligible to apply. Applications will be accepted online at http://upanganwadibharti.in from 27 June 2026 to 17 July 2026 (midnight 12:00).

application_fee.details: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification for the Meerut UP Anganwadi Recruitment 2026. The online application at upanganwadibharti.in is free of cost for all eligible female candidates. | Also Read:UP Anganwadi Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 787 Anganwadi Worker & Helper Posts

qualification.details: Only female candidates are eligible to apply for the Meerut Anganwadi Bharti 2026. The candidate must be a permanent resident of the gram sabha/ward (urban area) for which the vacancy exists. Applications from candidates who are residents of a different gram sabha/ward will not be accepted. | Candidates wondering about the age requirement for the UP Anganwadi Meerut Recruitment 2026 should note that the minimum age is 18 years and the maximum age is 35 years as on 01 January 2026. Age will be verified only from the date of birth recorded in the High School (10th class) mark sheet and certificate. Candidates who are below 18 years or above 35 years as on 01 January 2026 are not eligible. | The applicant must be a permanent resident of the gram sabha or ward (in urban/shahari areas) for which the Anganwadi Worker vacancy exists. Applications from candidates residing in a different gram sabha or ward will not be accepted under any circumstances. This residential requirement is strictly enforced for the Meerut Anganwadi Vacancy 2026.

vacancy_details.Area Type: Rural + Urban (Haastinaapur Nagar Panchayat – Ward No. 15)
Rural + Urban (Shahjahanpur Nagar Panchayat – Ward No. 6, 7)
Rural + Urban (Daurala Nagar Panchayat – Ward No. 6, 7, 8, 9)
Rural + Urban (Hara Nagar Panchayat – Ward No. 6, 15)

how_to_apply: Eligible female candidates can apply for the Meerut Anganwadi Worker Vacancy 2026 exclusively through the online portal at http://upanganwadibharti.in. The application portal is open from 27 June 2026 to 17 July 2026 (midnight 12:00). No offline applications sent by post or submitted in person will be accepted or considered under any circumstances for the Meerut Anganwadi Bharti 2026.
Visit the official UP Anganwadi recruitment portal at http://upanganwadibharti.in.
Check the gram sabha/ward-wise vacancy list for Meerut district to identify the specific post in your gram sabha or ward.
Register on the portal and fill in the online application form with your personal, educational, and residential details.

Upload self-attested copies of required documents - educational certificates, age proof (High School marksheet), residence certificate, income certificate, and caste certificate (if applicable) - all with online-verifiable digital signatures from the tehsil authority.
Submit the application form online before 17 July 2026 (midnight 12:00).
Take a printout of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. Has the Meerut Anganwadi Recruitment 2026 official notification been released?
faq.answer: Yes, the District Programme Officer (ICDS), Meerut has officially released the Meerut Anganwadi Recruitment 2026 notification on 25 June 2026 for 180 Anganwadi Worker vacancies across 13 Child Development Projects in Meerut district, Uttar Pradesh.

faq.question: Q2. What is the last date to apply for Meerut UP Anganwadi Bharti 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the online application for the Meerut Anganwadi Worker Recruitment 2026 is 17 July 2026 up to midnight (12:00). Applications are submitted only online at http://upanganwadibharti.in.

faq.question: Q3. How many total vacancies are available in Meerut Anganwadi Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: A total of 180 Anganwadi Worker (Karyakatri) vacancies are available across 13 Child Development Projects in Meerut district. The largest number of vacancies (56) is in the Shahar (Urban) project, followed by Daurala (18 rural + 4 urban) and Haastinapur (16 rural + 1 urban).

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for Meerut Anganwadi Vacancy 2026?
faq.answer: The minimum age is 18 years and the maximum age is 35 years as on 01 January 2026. Age will be verified only from the High School (Class X) marksheet and certificate. No other document will be accepted as age proof.

faq.question: Q5. What is the educational qualification required for Meerut Anganwadi Worker Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The minimum educational qualification is Intermediate (12th Pass) or equivalent. The merit list will be prepared on the basis of the maximum (highest) educational qualification. Candidates holding a graduation degree will be ranked above those with only Intermediate.

faq.question: Q6. Is there an application fee for Meerut Anganwadi Bharti 2026?
faq.answer: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification. The online application at upanganwadibharti.in is free of cost for all eligible female candidates.

faq.question: Q7. Is there a written exam for Meerut Anganwadi Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: No. There is no written examination. Selection is done by the district-level Chayan Samiti (Selection Committee) constituted in Meerut, based on merit from educational qualifications and priority category. The Chayan Samiti's decision is final.

faq.question: Q8. Can male candidates apply for Meerut Anganwadi Worker Vacancy 2026?
faq.answer: No. The official notification clearly states that only female candidates are eligible to apply for the Anganwadi Worker posts in Meerut district.

faq.question: Q9. Can I apply for any project in Meerut or only for my own gram sabha/ward?
faq.answer: Candidates can apply only for the Anganwadi Worker post in their own gram sabha or ward where they are a permanent resident. Applications from candidates residing in a different gram sabha or ward will be rejected.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official website for Meerut Anganwadi Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The official website for submitting applications and downloading the gram sabha/ward-wise vacancy list is http://upanganwadibharti.in. Gram sabha/ward-wise details will also be available at the Collectorate, Vikas Bhavan, Tehsil, and Vikas Khand offices in Meerut.

title: UP Anganwadi Recruitment 2026 Notification Out - Apply Online for 180 Anganwadi Worker Posts in Meerut District
